headings: Sports DataBasketball API Index and User Guide
tables: https is the default request type
Request domain to access the Sports Data API. For most clients, this is the default: api.performfeeds.com Use the defaul
Resource of the Sports Data API. In this case, the Basketball API: basketballdata
Feed name of the resource in the Basketball API. For example: squads
Outlet Authentication Key . A unique 26-character alphanumeric UUID which is unique to each outlet. Any requests made wi
Query parameters . There are required and optional parameters. Optional parameters can help you to search the feed and c
Tournament Calendars (OT2) Tournament Calendars (OT2) Get basic information about the tournament calendars - the individ
Tournament Schedule (MA0) Tournament Schedule (MA0) Get schedule information for a tournament, with the individual match
Fixtures and Results (MA1) Fixtures and Results (MA1) Provides a detailed fixture list including match details such as d
Match Statistics (MA2) Match Statistics (MA2) Provides detailed match statistics for teams and each individual player
Match Events (MA3) Match Events (MA3) Provides all player events in a game, including player, team, event, type, minute,
Head-2-Head (MA10) Head-2-Head (MA10) Get and compare historical results for two opposing teams, including total/home/aw
Live Win Probability (MA21) Live Win Probability (MA21) Get match-win probability data for each team including pre-match
